TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Cipuwa, title = Cipuwa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cipuwa} }

S.FORM: = Cipuwa = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Cipuwa. 279 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 759 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 122 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 637 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis14%, Bunun1%. Pusu nniqan alang Mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida alang Cinfung o tmhangan dha "Kuncian ". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa. Gasuc Gaga siyaw alang Cinfung. Tiri Breenux. Pgkla patas cyawtung ●Mgrig su na rulu: Kndadax paru alang Skanki kksa muda elug Cunghwa dhuq Cian, qiri lutuc elug cungsanru 3 do kika qhuq. Klegan sjiqan nealang Amis. Snhiyan cungcyaw Joro, Teyeyncucyaw, Focyaw, Dawcyaw. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ●Saan rmigaw: 吉野神社鎮座紀念碑 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian elug 10 cyey Cipuwa. ●Pusu pnhyugan: Kska sapah pyasan Cian 03-8523136 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa elug cungsanru 3 662haw. ●Pnyahan pnatas: Pgkla patas saan rmigaw
S.PHON: = ʦipuwa = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦipuwa. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ mniq saw mnɾmuxan tanaħ tunux siida alaŋ ʦin*uŋ o tmħaŋan dħa "kunʦian ". nniqan alaŋ njusan skanki nsgan ʦian alaŋ ʦipuwa. gasuʦ gaga sijaw alaŋ ʦin*uŋ. tiɾi bɾəənux. pgkla patas ʦjawtuŋ *mgɾig su na ɾulu: kndadax paɾu alaŋ skanki kksa muda əlug ʦuŋħwa dħuq ʦian, qiɾi lutuʦ əlug ʦuŋsanɾu * do kika qħuq. kləgan sɟiqan nəalaŋ amis. snħijan ʦuŋʦjaw ɟoɾo, təənʦuʦjaw, *oʦjaw, dawʦjaw. pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw *saan ɾmigaw: ********* njusan skanki nsgan ʦian əlug ** ʦjə ʦipuwa. *pusu pnħjugan: kska sapaħ pjasan ʦian **-******* njusan skanki nsgan ʦian alaŋ ʦipuwa əlug ʦuŋsanɾu * ***ħaw. *pnjaħan pnatas: pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw
S.FORM: = Cipuwa = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Cipuwa. 279 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 759 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 122 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 637 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis14%, Bunun1%. Pusu nniqan alang Mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida alang Cinfung o tmhangan dha "Kuncian ". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa. Gasuc Gaga siyaw alang Cinfung. Tiri Breenux. Pgkla patas cyawtung ●Mgrig su na rulu: Kndadax paru alang Skanki kksa muda elug Cunghwa dhuq Cian, qiri lutuc elug cungsanru 3 do kika qhuq. Klegan sjiqan nealang Amis. Snhiyan cungcyaw Joro, Teyeyncucyaw, Focyaw, Dawcyaw. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ●Saan rmigaw: 吉野神社鎮座紀念碑 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian elug 10 cyey Cipuwa. ●Pusu pnhyugan: Kska sapah pyasan Cian 03-8523136 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa elug cungsanru 3 662haw. ●Pnyahan pnatas: Pgkla patas saan rmigaw
S.PHON: = ʦipuwa = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦipuwa. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ mniq saw mnɾmuxan tanaħ tunux siida alaŋ ʦin*uŋ o tmħaŋan dħa "kunʦian ". nniqan alaŋ njusan skanki nsgan ʦian alaŋ ʦipuwa. gasuʦ gaga sijaw alaŋ ʦin*uŋ. tiɾi bɾəənux. pgkla patas ʦjawtuŋ *mgɾig su na ɾulu: kndadax paɾu alaŋ skanki kksa muda əlug ʦuŋħwa dħuq ʦian, qiɾi lutuʦ əlug ʦuŋsanɾu * do kika qħuq. kləgan sɟiqan nəalaŋ amis. snħijan ʦuŋʦjaw ɟoɾo, təənʦuʦjaw, *oʦjaw, dawʦjaw. pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw *saan ɾmigaw: ********* njusan skanki nsgan ʦian əlug ** ʦjə ʦipuwa. *pusu pnħjugan: kska sapaħ pjasan ʦian **-******* njusan skanki nsgan ʦian alaŋ ʦipuwa əlug ʦuŋsanɾu * ***ħaw. *pnjaħan pnatas: pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw
